note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right lower extremity wound site, rates 2/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Arterial arterial Right lower extremity measures 2.5 cm x 1.9 cm x 0.9 cm.
  Wound bed: 41% slough, 59% granulation tissue. Periwound: indurated.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: none.
Assessment: Arterial arterial Right lower extremity — not improving.
Plan: Offloading boot applied. Foam dressing change daily.

Pt seen for wound eval. Arterial Right lower extremity measures aprx 2.5 x 1.9cm, depth 0.9cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - L heel 1.5x1.1, 0.5cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Thu.
